observations.observation: validation is restored only on the continuation proving the exact aliased helper result nil; discarded, overwritten, or mismatched results remain invalid or inconclusive
the else-edge return retains the object obligation and is a violation or blocking inconclusive
one deterministic actionable unknown-directive diagnostic is emitted before any directive consumer runs
credit is accepted only when producer-emitted executed observations contain the claimed category, boundary, stages, dimensions, properties, and populations
the subgate fails before success unless every manifest member exists and is uniquely observed in the current run
the entire relevant fact is rejected and dependent analysis becomes blocking inconclusive
materialization and freshness verification fail until one v3 record binds the complete intended diff, all ledgers, artifacts, observations, and archive order
the mutant is invalid unless a structured observation proves the declared semantic mismatch after clean controls and exact restoration
the package initializer literal is analyzed exactly once even without a visible call, or emits blocking inconclusive if its procedure identity is unresolved
mutable escape invalidates proof or is blocking inconclusive; an alias-free immutable copy preserves validation
classification occurs first and the inconclusive diagnostic remains always visible
IDs remain layout-stable, differ across full import paths, and collisions or duplicate emissions fail before baseline write
